_meta.description: Vendor-tenant catalog for ArcGIS Online hosts that publish municipal zoning. Auto-grown by jurisdictions._review on verify; seeded by operators or by tenant-directory discovery sweeps. Format documented in backend/app/services/tenant_catalog.py.

services6.arcgis.com/UcuMPLF9IlsigGHI.notes: Tenant directory probed 2026-05-15 — 65 total services across NJ municipalities for assets/MS4/FEMA work; 4 zoning-named services. Vendor name TBD.

services1.arcgis.com/ze0XBzU1FXj94DJq.vendor: NJ statewide data aggregator (TBD — possibly NJ Future, Fair Share Housing Center, or NJ DCA)

candidate_munis.notes: Hub title 'Teaneck Zoning Public View' — URL is a hosted feature view; resolve via Hub item lookup, not direct service path.

statewide_layers.name: Municipal_Zoning
statewide_layers.purpose: NJ-wide muni-boundary polygons enriched with (Map URL, Ordinance URL, Website URL) per town. All 70 Bergen towns present.

statewide_layers.name: 20200609_Zoning
statewide_layers.purpose: NJSEA (NJ Sports & Exposition Authority) zoning for Meadowlands District — 163 polygons covering 10 Bergen Meadowlands towns (Carlstadt, East Rutherford, Little Ferry, Lyndhurst, Moonachie, North Arlington, Ridgefield, Rutherford, South Hackensack, Teterboro)

statewide_layers.name: NJLANDUSE
statewide_layers.purpose: NJDEP statewide LULC polygons (land use, NOT regulatory zoning). Use only as parcel_use_category fallback per NJ_STATEWIDE_SOURCES.md.

services1.arcgis.com/ze0XBzU1FXj94DJq.notes: MAJOR FIND — 3,167 total services on this tenant. Statewide-aggregator-style content. Probed 2026-05-15.

denylist._doc: Tenants confirmed by operator as generic-FP publishers (cross-jurisdiction over-surfacing). Scoring penalizes any URL matching these prefixes.
